positive: Stylized illustration of a whimsical forest creature, blending elements of a fox, a luna moth, and deep forest roots. The creature is depicted in a dynamic, stylized pose, leaping through oversized, stylized foliage. Use strong, graphic silhouettes and high contrast between the glowing, ethereal creature and the detailed, shadowy forest environment. Color palette should be deep emerald greens, royal blues, burnt oranges, and creamy whites, accented by bioluminescent points of light. Composition should be centered and visually balanced, suitable for a repeat pattern or central apparel print. Art style: highly detailed vector art meets modern gothic illustration, suitable for DTG printing. Clean lines, flat areas of color contrasted with delicate texture.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, brand, signature, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, lowres, noisy, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, realism
